title: Runa Document
description: Schema for .runa document files. Version field drives migration; parsers must reject documents with unsupported versions.

version.description: Schema version (MAJOR.MINOR). Parsers must check this field first. Breaking changes bump MAJOR. MINOR additions are backwards-compatible.

id.description: Unique document identifier (UUID v4). Immutable after creation.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of document creation. Immutable after creation.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last modification. Updated on every save.

blocks.description: Ordered list of content blocks. Order is significant — it matches the visual top-to-bottom layout.

Block.description: A content block. Discriminated by the 'type' field.

MarkdownBlock.description: A block of raw Markdown text.

id.description: Unique block identifier (UUID v4). Immutable after creation.

content.description: Raw Markdown content. Empty string is valid (new empty block).

InkBlock.description: A block containing freehand ink strokes drawn on a canvas.

id.description: Unique block identifier (UUID v4). Immutable after creation.

height.description: Canvas height in logical pixels. Default 200.0. May be resized by the user.

strokes.description: List of ink strokes in draw order (painter's algorithm).

color.description: Stroke color in #RRGGBBAA format (red, green, blue, alpha). Example: #000000FF = opaque black.

width.description: Base stroke width in logical pixels before pressure scaling.

tool.description: Tool that produced this stroke. Affects rendering style.

points.description: Ordered sequence of input points. At least one point is required.

StrokePoint.description: A single sampled input point within a stroke.

x.description: X coordinate in logical pixels relative to the InkBlock canvas origin.

y.description: Y coordinate in logical pixels relative to the InkBlock canvas origin.

pressure.description: Stylus or touch pressure normalised to [0.0, 1.0]. Use 0.5 when the device does not report pressure.

timestamp.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch when this point was sampled.
